notes: Sprint 2B reproduction: Run Phase E2 (Sample Efficiency) with identical parameters to Project 11. Evaluates uniform, boundary, and mixed sampling strategies across N ∈ {250,500,1000,1500,2000}. Three stochastic seeds [101, 202, 303]. Outputs go to project_12/results/repro/phase_e2/.
